extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters filed by and against each entity: I excluded all “By” rows and counted the “Against” rows, with criminal proceedings nil and statutory/regulatory proceedings nil; tax proceedings against the company and subsidiaries are 4 + 5 = 9, excluding promoter/director tax matters. The quantified aggregate amount against the consolidated company and subsidiaries is ₹535.90 million against subsidiaries plus ₹25.84 million against the company = ₹561.74 million, or ₹56.174 crore; promoter/director amounts and all “By” rows are excluded. The contingent-liabilities table is in ₹ million and, as of June 30, 2023, shows disputed income-tax demand of ₹155.64 million and guarantees of ₹116.69 million; no stated Total row is shown, so the latest-date components sum to ₹272.33 million, or ₹27.233 crore. The only concentration figures are region/segment or subsidiary-specific, not company-wide top-five/top-ten customer concentration; the disclosed regional figure is 100% of revenue from operations for Fiscal 2023, but it is not a customer concentration measure. Monetary tables use ₹ million, converted to crore by dividing by 10.
